name: conduit-browser
description: Linked one-to-eight-pane Electron browser with smooth pane following, isolated routes, beta ad filtering, live toolbar settings, and a compact mineral-glass interface.

scripts.check: node --check src/main-v15.js && node --check src/adblocker.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/core.js && node --check src/tor-manager.js && node --check src/tor-bridge.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/page-preload.js && node --check src/renderer/interaction-guard.js && node --check src/renderer/app-v11.js && node --check src/renderer/ui-v14.js && node --check src/renderer/ui-v15.js && npm test
